AISuggestion.name: Wallet coin insertion delay mismatch
AISuggestion.description: The Wallet behavior does not match the specification: the user should take between 20 and 40 seconds to insert a coin, but the model sets `minUserDelay = 50` and `maxUserDelay = 70`.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Modify the Wallet behavior so the coin insertion delay is chosen between 20 and 40 seconds, and update the corresponding delay attributes accordingly.

TURTLEGMODELING.SPECIFICATION:
This coffee machine dispenses a beverage only after two coins have been deposited. If there's a substantial delay between (i.e., more than 30 seconds) the insertion of the first and second coins, the machine returns the initial coin. Likewise, if a beverage isn't selected promptly after the deposit of the two coins, both coins are automatically ejected. If either of the beverage buttons (tea or coffee) is pressed before the coins are ejected, the machine begins to prepare the selected drink. Notably, it takes 10 seconds to brew a coffee and 8 seconds to make a tea. Once the beverage has been collected, the machine is ready to accept new coins for the next order.
The user is represented as a Wallet that contains two coins when the system starts. The wallet takes between 20 and 40 seconds to insert a coin.
Use between 3 and 6 blocks.

textline.data: The availability of the machine shall be
A wallet must never contain a
The coffee machine never has one coin
inserted more than 50 units of time
When the application starts, if the wallet contains
at least 2 coins, then a beverage may be delivered.
On the contrary, if the wallet contains less than 2
coins, no beverage will be delivered by the

infoparam.name: TGComponent
infoparam.value: nbOfCoins >= 0

infoparam.name: TGComponent
infoparam.value: nbOfCoins > 1

infoparam.name: UML Note
infoparam.value: CoffeeMachine featuring two main functions: - coin ejection - tea or coffee selection

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value:
A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2
A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1
F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin
CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion.
283 s
Semantic oracle evaluation = 6
Our evaluation: - 8 for the final model: - one action misses on the transition state0 -> main in TeaButton - actions on the transition TeaDelivered -> WaitingForFirstCoin in CoffeeMachine could be improved - 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description of the suggestion)
MissingTeaSelection/Structure: The model only implements the coffee-selection path, while the specification requires both tea and coffee. There is no TeaButton block or connection, and the CoffeeMachine state machine never handles pushTeaButton or models the tea preparation before returning to the idle state.
How to solve? Add a TeaButton block and connect it to CoffeeMachine.pushTeaButton. Extend the CoffeeMachine state machine so WaitingForSelection also accepts tea selection and add a tea-preparation path lasting 8 seconds before the machine returns to WaitingForFirstCoin.
Concerned views:BlockDiagram,CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine New components : TeaButton
mutations: add block TeaButton attach TeaButton to CoffeeMachine add output signal push in TeaButton add state main in TeaButton add state state0 in TeaButton add transition in TeaButton from start to main add transition in TeaButton from main to state0 add transition in TeaButton from state0 to main with after(10,10) and "push()" add private synchronous link between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine add connection from push in TeaButton to pushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine in private synchronous link add action on signal TeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add state TeaDelivered in CoffeeMachine add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to TeaSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaSelection to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8)

Line.value: - one action misses on the transition state0 -> main in TeaButton
- actions on the transition TeaDelivered -> WaitingForFirstCoin in CoffeeMachine could be improved
- 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description of the suggestion)

MissingTeaSelection/Structure: The model only implements the coffee-selection path, while the specification requires both tea and coffee. There is no TeaButton block or connection, and the CoffeeMachine state machine never handles pushTeaButton or models the tea preparation before returning to the idle state.

How to solve? Add a TeaButton block and connect it to CoffeeMachine.pushTeaButton. Extend the CoffeeMachine state machine so WaitingForSelection also accepts tea selection and add a tea-preparation path lasting 8 seconds before the machine returns to WaitingForFirstCoin.
add output signal push in TeaButton
add transition in TeaButton from start to main
add transition in TeaButton from main to state0
add transition in TeaButton from state0 to main with after(10,10) and "push()"
add private synchronous link between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine
add connection from push in TeaButton to pushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine in private synchronous link
add action on signal TeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to TeaSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaSelection to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8)

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion.
257 seconds
Semantic oracle evaluation = 8
Our evaluation = - 10 for the final model - 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description of the suggestion)
MissingTeaSelection/Structure: The model does not include a TeaButton block or a complete tea-selection behavior, while the specification requires two beverage buttons (tea and coffee) and preparation of the selected drink before the machine becomes ready again.
How to solve? Add a TeaButton block. Connect it to CoffeeMachine.pushTeaButton. Extend CoffeeMachine so that WaitingForSelection can also accept tea selection and follow a tea preparation path before returning to the initial waiting state.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram
CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine
New components: TeaButton
Mutations: add block TeaButton add attribute int mechanicalDelay = 10 in TeaButton add output signal push in TeaButton add state main in TeaButton add state state0 in TeaButton add action on signal actPush in TeaButton with push() add transition in TeaButton from start to main add transition in TeaButton from main to state0 add transition in TeaButton from state0 to actPush with after(10,10) add transition in TeaButton from actPush to main add private synchronous link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine add connection from push to pushTeaButton in link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton add state TeaDelivered in CoffeeMachine add action on signal actPushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to actPushTeaButton add transition in CoffeeMachine from actPushTeaButton to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins=0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

Line.value: - 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description of the suggestion)

The model does not include a TeaButton block or a complete tea-selection behavior, while the specification requires two beverage buttons (tea and coffee) and preparation of the selected drink before the machine becomes ready again.
Extend CoffeeMachine so that WaitingForSelection can also accept tea selection and follow a tea preparation path before returning to the initial waiting state.
add attribute int mechanicalDelay = 10 in TeaButton
add output signal push in TeaButton
add action on signal actPush in TeaButton with push()
add transition in TeaButton from start to main
add transition in TeaButton from main to state0
add transition in TeaButton from state0 to actPush with after(10,10)
add transition in TeaButton from actPush to main
add private synchronous link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine
add connection from push to pushTeaButton in link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton
add action on signal actPushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to actPushTeaButton
add transition in CoffeeMachine from actPushTeaButton to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins=0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion.
167 seconds.
Semantic oracle evaluation = 8
Our evaluation: - 6 for the final model: - SMD missing - actions on the transition TeaDelivered -> WaitingForFirstCoin in CoffeeMachine could be improved - 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description)
AddTeaSelection/Structure: The model does not capture the tea selection required by the specification: there is no TeaButton block or connection, and the CoffeeMachine behavior only handles coffee while omitting the tea-button-triggered preparation path.
How to solve? Add a TeaButton block, connect it to CoffeeMachine.pushTeaButton, and extend the CoffeeMachine state machine so that WaitingForSelection accepts the tea button event and executes a tea preparation path before returning to the initial state.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram, CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine
New components: TeaButton
Mutations: add block TeaButton add output signal push in TeaButton add private synchronous link between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine add connection from push in TeaButton to pushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine in private synchronous link add state PreparingTea in CoffeeMachine add action on signal teaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to teaSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from teaSelection to PreparingTea with "nbOfCoins=0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from PreparingTea to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8)

Line.value: - actions on the transition TeaDelivered -> WaitingForFirstCoin in CoffeeMachine could be improved
- 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description)
The model does not capture the tea selection required by the specification:
there is no TeaButton block or connection,
and the CoffeeMachine behavior only handles coffee while omitting the tea-button-triggered preparation path.
and extend the CoffeeMachine state machine so that WaitingForSelection accepts the tea button event
and executes a tea preparation path before returning to the initial state.
add output signal push in TeaButton
add private synchronous link between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine
add connection from push in TeaButton to pushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine in private synchronous link
add action on signal teaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to teaSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from teaSelection to PreparingTea with "nbOfCoins=0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from PreparingTea to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8)

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion.
154 seconds.
Semantic oracle evaluation = 9
Our evaluation: - 10 for the final model - 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description)
MissingTeaSelection/Structure: The model does not capture the tea-selection behavior required by the specification. Although `pushTeaButton` is declared, there is no TeaButton block in the structure and no transition in `CoffeeMachine` reacting to tea selection, so the machine cannot prepare tea before coin ejection.
How to solve? Add a TeaButton block and connect it to `CoffeeMachine.pushTeaButton` in the BlockDiagram. Extend `CoffeeMachine` with a transition from `WaitingForSelection` on `pushTeaButton` to a tea-preparation/delivery state that models tea production with an 8-second delay, then return to the initial coin-waiting state after delivery/collection.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram, CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine
New components: TeaButton, TeaDelivered
Mutations: add block TeaButton attach TeaButton to CoffeeMachine add output signal push in TeaButton add state main in TeaButton add state state0 in TeaButton add action on signal teaPush in TeaButton with push() add transition in TeaButton from start to main add transition in TeaButton from main to state0 add transition in TeaButton from state0 to teaPush add transition in TeaButton from teaPush to main with after(10,10) add private synchronous link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine add connection from push to pushTeaButton in link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton add state TeaDelivered in CoffeeMachine add action on signal teaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to teaSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from teaSelection to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins=0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

Line.value: - 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description)
The model does not capture the tea-selection behavior required by the specification.
there is no TeaButton block in the structure
and no transition in `CoffeeMachine` reacting to tea selection,
so the machine cannot prepare tea before coin ejection.
and connect it to `CoffeeMachine.pushTeaButton` in the BlockDiagram.
Extend `CoffeeMachine` with a transition from `WaitingForSelection` on `pushTeaButton`
to a tea-preparation/delivery state that models tea production with an 8-second delay,
then return to the initial coin-waiting state after delivery/collection.

add action on signal teaPush in TeaButton with push()
add transition in TeaButton from start to main
add transition in TeaButton from main to state0
add transition in TeaButton from state0 to teaPush
add transition in TeaButton from teaPush to main with after(10,10)
add private synchronous link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton between TeaButton and CoffeeMachine
add connection from push to pushTeaButton in link TeaButton_push__CoffeeMachine_pushTeaButton
add action on signal teaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to teaSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from teaSelection to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins=0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion.
147 seconds.
Semantic oracle evaluation = 8
Our evaluation: - 9 for the final model: actions on the transition TeaDelivered -> WaitingForFirstCoin in CoffeeMachine could be improved - 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description)
MissingTeaPreparation/Structure: The specification requires two beverage choices, tea and coffee, but the model only operationalizes coffee. Although `CoffeeMachine` declares `pushTeaButton`, there is no TeaButton block, no connection emitting that signal, and no state-machine path for preparing tea.
How to solve? Add a TeaButton block and connect it to `CoffeeMachine.pushTeaButton`. Extend the `CoffeeMachine` state machine with a tea-selection branch that is triggered before coin ejection and models tea preparation separately from coffee.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram, CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine
New components: TeaButton
Mutations: add block TeaButton add attribute int mechanicalDelay = 10 in TeaButton add output signal push in TeaButton add state main in TeaButton add state state0 in TeaButton add transition in TeaButton from start to main add transition in TeaButton from main to state0 add action on signal actPush in TeaButton with push() add transition in TeaButton from state0 to actPush add transition in TeaButton from actPush to main with after(10,10) attach TeaButton to CoffeeMachine add connection from push in TeaButton to pushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine in private synchronous link add state TeaPreparation in CoffeeMachine add state TeaDelivered in CoffeeMachine add action on signal actTea in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to actTea add transition in CoffeeMachine from actTea to TeaPreparation with "nbOfCoins=0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaPreparation to TeaDelivered with after(8,8) add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin

Line.value: - 9 for the final model: actions on the transition TeaDelivered -> WaitingForFirstCoin in CoffeeMachine could be improved
- 10 for the mutation quality (fully implements the textual description)
The specification requires two beverage choices,
but the model only operationalizes coffee.
and no state-machine path for preparing tea.
Extend the `CoffeeMachine` state machine with a tea-selection branch
that is triggered before coin ejection
and models tea preparation separately from coffee.
add attribute int mechanicalDelay = 10 in TeaButton
add output signal push in TeaButton
add transition in TeaButton from start to main
add transition in TeaButton from main to state0
add action on signal actPush in TeaButton with push()
add transition in TeaButton from state0 to actPush
add transition in TeaButton from actPush to main with after(10,10)
add connection from push in TeaButton to pushTeaButton in CoffeeMachine in private synchronous link
add action on signal actTea in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to actTea
add transition in CoffeeMachine from actTea to TeaPreparation with "nbOfCoins=0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaPreparation to TeaDelivered with after(8,8)
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

infoparam.value:
A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2
A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1
F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin

connector from start state to state0
List of all parameters of an Avatar SMD transition
UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion
- 176 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation = 9
- Our evaluation: - Final model = 9 (initialization errors in Wallet could also have been corrected) - Mutation script = 10 (perfectly implement the textual description of the suggestion)
CorrectTimingConstraints/Structure: The CoffeeMachine behavior does not match the specification timing constraints: the timeout between coins and the timeout before beverage selection are modeled as 50 seconds instead of 30 seconds, and tea/coffee are delivered immediately after button press instead of after fixed preparation times of 8 seconds and 10 seconds.
How to solve? Modify the CoffeeMachine state machine so that both coin-related timeouts are 30 seconds. After tea selection, wait 8 seconds before delivery; after coffee selection, wait 10 seconds before delivery. Trigger beverageReady only after the corresponding preparation delay, then return to the initial waiting state.
Concerned views: CoffeeMachine
component: CoffeeMachine new components : mutations: remove attribute coinDelay in CoffeeMachine add attribute int coinDelay = 30 in CoffeeMachine remove action on signal in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton() remove action on signal in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add action on signal ReceiveCoffeeSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton() add action on signal ReceiveTeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveCoffeeSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveCoffeeSelection to CoffeeDelivered with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveTeaSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveTeaSelection to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins = 0" remove transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeeDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin remove transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin add transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeeDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(10,10) and "beverageReady()" add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

Line.value: - Final model = 9 (initialization errors in Wallet could also have been corrected)
- Mutation script = 10 (perfectly implement the textual description of the suggestion)

The CoffeeMachine behavior does not match the specification timing constraints: the timeout between coins and the timeout before beverage selection are modeled as 50 seconds instead of 30 seconds, and tea/coffee are delivered immediately after button press instead of after fixed preparation times of 8 seconds and 10 seconds.
Modify the CoffeeMachine state machine so that both coin-related timeouts are 30 seconds.
After tea selection, wait 8 seconds before delivery; after coffee selection, wait 10 seconds before delivery.
Trigger beverageReady only after the corresponding preparation delay, then return to the initial waiting state.
add attribute int coinDelay = 30 in CoffeeMachine
remove action on signal in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton()
remove action on signal in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add action on signal ReceiveCoffeeSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton()
add action on signal ReceiveTeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveCoffeeSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveCoffeeSelection to CoffeeDelivered with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveTeaSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveTeaSelection to TeaDelivered with "nbOfCoins = 0"
remove transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeeDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin
remove transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin
add transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeeDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(10,10) and "beverageReady()"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaDelivered to WaitingForFirstCoin with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Executable* suggestion
- Our evaluation: - Resulting model = 0 (impossible to execute the mutation script) - Mutation script = 8 (incorrect prefixes to block names due to SysML v2 export, but excellent logic)
Correct wallet coin insertion delay/Structure: The Wallet behavior does not match the specification because each coin insertion is modeled with a delay between 50 and 70 seconds, while the specification requires a delay between 20 and 40 seconds.
How to solve? Modify the Wallet timing parameters so each putCoin action occurs after a delay uniformly chosen between 20 and 40 seconds.
Concerned views: Wallet
component: Wallet new components : mutations: remove attribute minUserDelay in Block__Wallet add attribute int minUserDelay = 20 in Block__Wallet remove attribute maxUserDelay in Block__Wallet add attribute int maxUserDelay = 40 in Block__Wallet

Line.value: - Resulting model = 0 (impossible to execute the mutation script)
- Mutation script = 8 (incorrect prefixes to block names due to SysML v2 export, but excellent logic)

Correct wallet coin insertion delay/Structure: The Wallet behavior does not match the specification because each coin insertion is modeled with a delay between 50 and 70 seconds, while the specification requires a delay between 20 and 40 seconds.
How to solve? Modify the Wallet timing parameters so each putCoin action occurs after a delay uniformly chosen between 20 and 40 seconds.
add attribute int minUserDelay = 20 in Block__Wallet
add attribute int maxUserDelay = 40 in Block__Wallet

F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Executable* suggestion
- Our evaluation: - Resulting model = 0 (impossible to execute the mutation script) - Mutation script = 8 (incorrect prefixes to block names due to SysML v2 export, but excellent logic)
CorrectWalletCoinInsertionTiming/Structure: The Wallet behavior does not match the specification: the user is supposed to take between 20 and 40 seconds to insert a coin, but the model sets `minUserDelay = 50` and `maxUserDelay = 70`.
How to solve? Modify the Wallet state machine so that the coin insertion delay is chosen between 20 and 40 seconds instead of 50 and 70. Keep this timing in the Wallet behavior that sends `putCoin`.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram,Wallet component: Wallet new components :
mutations: remove attribute minUserDelay in Block__Wallet add attribute int minUserDelay = 20 in Block__Wallet remove attribute maxUserDelay in Block__Wallet add attribute int maxUserDelay = 40 in Block__Wallet

Line.value: - Resulting model = 0 (impossible to execute the mutation script)
- Mutation script = 8 (incorrect prefixes to block names due to SysML v2 export, but excellent logic)
The Wallet behavior does not match the specification: the user is supposed to take between 20 and 40 seconds to insert a coin, but the model sets `minUserDelay = 50` and `maxUserDelay = 70`.
Modify the Wallet state machine so that the coin insertion delay is chosen between 20 and 40 seconds instead of 50 and 70.
Keep this timing in the Wallet behavior that sends `putCoin`.
add attribute int minUserDelay = 20 in Block__Wallet
add attribute int maxUserDelay = 40 in Block__Wallet

infoparam.value: CoffeeMachine featuring two main functions: - coin ejection - tea or coffee selection

A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1
F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin
CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

List of all parameters of an Avatar SMD transition
UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Executable* suggestion
- 255 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation (on SysML v2) = 10
- Our evaluation: - Resulting model = 0 (the suggestion induces anormal regressions) - Mutation script = 5
CorrectCoffeeMachineTiming/Structure: The CoffeeMachine timing behavior is inconsistent with the specification: the model waits 50 seconds instead of 30 before ejecting coins, and it has no explicit 10-second coffee preparation or 8-second tea preparation.
How to solve? Revise the CoffeeMachine state machine so the timeout between the first and second coins is 30 seconds, the timeout after two coins before drink selection is 30 seconds, and add explicit timed preparation states so coffee takes 10 seconds and tea takes 8 seconds before delivery.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram,CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine new components :
mutations: remove attribute coinDelay in CoffeeMachine add attribute int coinTimeout = 30 in CoffeeMachine remove attribute coffeeMinDelay in CoffeeMachine remove attribute coffeeMaxDelay in CoffeeMachine remove attribute teaMinDelay in CoffeeMachine remove attribute teaMaxDelay in CoffeeMachine add attribute int coffeePreparationDelay = 10 in CoffeeMachine add attribute int teaPreparationDelay = 8 in CoffeeMachine add state PrepareCoffee in CoffeeMachine add state PrepareTea in CoffeeMachine remove state Beverage in CoffeeMachine

Line.value: - Resulting model = 0 (the suggestion induces anormal regressions)

CorrectCoffeeMachineTiming/Structure: The CoffeeMachine timing behavior is inconsistent with the specification: the model waits 50 seconds instead of 30 before ejecting coins, and it has no explicit 10-second coffee preparation or 8-second tea preparation.

How to solve? Revise the CoffeeMachine state machine so the timeout between the first and second coins is 30 seconds, the timeout after two coins before drink selection is 30 seconds, and add explicit timed preparation states so coffee takes 10 seconds and tea takes 8 seconds before delivery.
add attribute int coinTimeout = 30 in CoffeeMachine
add attribute int coffeePreparationDelay = 10 in CoffeeMachine
add attribute int teaPreparationDelay = 8 in CoffeeMachine

infoparam.name: UML Note
infoparam.value: CoffeeMachine featuring two main functions: - coin ejection - tea or coffee selection

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion
- 52 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation = 10
- Our evaluation: - Final model = 9 (initialization errors could have been corrected in the block CoffeeMachine) - Mutation script = 10
Wallet coin insertion delay mismatch/Structure: The Wallet behavior does not match the specification: the user should take between 20 and 40 seconds to insert a coin, but the model sets `minUserDelay = 50` and `maxUserDelay = 70`.
How to solve? Modify the Wallet behavior so the coin insertion delay is chosen between 20 and 40 seconds, and update the corresponding delay attributes accordingly.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram,Wallet
component: Wallet new components : mutations: remove attribute minUserDelay in Wallet add attribute int minUserDelay = 20 in Wallet remove attribute maxUserDelay in Wallet add attribute int maxUserDelay = 40 in Wallet

Line.value: - Final model = 9 (initialization errors could have been corrected in the block CoffeeMachine)
The Wallet behavior does not match the specification: the user should take between 20 and 40 seconds to insert a coin, but the model sets `minUserDelay = 50` and `maxUserDelay = 70`.
Modify the Wallet behavior so the coin insertion delay is chosen between 20 and 40 seconds, and update the corresponding delay attributes accordingly.
add attribute int minUserDelay = 20 in Wallet
add attribute int maxUserDelay = 40 in Wallet

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3
